specs.title: Landing page (/) loads with correct content
Login page (/login) renders email + password fields + buttons
Demo mode: clicking 'Try Demo' sets cookie and redirects to /dashboard
Signup page (/signup) renders with role selection
Login with invalid credentials shows error
Login with valid credentials — submits form and shows response
Unauthenticated user accessing /dashboard gets redirected to /login
Authenticated user accessing /login stays on login (no server-side redirect for authenticated)
/dashboard loads, shows child name and summary cards
/benefits loads, shows benefit entries with status badges
Each nav item links to correct page
Settings link visible in sidebar footer
Document table shows entries from workspace API
Upload button is visible but disabled in demo mode
Document viewer dialog opens on click
Messages page loads with summary log and thread data
Clicking thread shows messages with chat bubbles
Message alignment: own messages right-aligned, others left-aligned
Sender name and role badge visible
/portal loads (shows empty state or linked families)
/portal/upload shows upload form or login redirect
/portal/messages shows message threads or login redirect
Demo banner visible in demo mode
API offline banner does NOT appear in demo mode
/portal/programs loads with programs table or empty state
Provider profile form has key fields
Provider programs shows demo data in demo mode
Dashboard mobile layout - no horizontal scroll
